messages.content:
You are an LLVM maintainer.
Users have reported a case where LLVM failed to optimize a specific program.
You are adding new code or modifying existing code to implement the missing optimization.
Please answer with the code directly. Do not include any additional information in the output.
Please answer with the complete code snippet (including the unmodified part) that replaces the original code. Do not answer with a diff.

check_fast_log.name: fast_cabsl
check_fast_log.body:
define fp128 @fast_cabsl(fp128 %real, fp128 %imag) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fast_cabsl(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = fmul fast fp128 [[REAL:%.*]], [[REAL]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = fmul fast fp128 [[IMAG:%.*]], [[IMAG]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP3:%.*]] = fadd fast fp128 [[TMP1]], [[TMP2]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CABS:%.*]] = tail call fast fp128 @llvm.sqrt.f128(fp128 [[TMP3]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret fp128 [[CABS]]
  %call = tail call fast fp128 @cabsl(fp128 %real, fp128 %imag)
  ret fp128 %call
}

declare fp128 @cabsl(fp128, fp128)

alive2.src:
define fp128 @fast_cabsl(fp128 %real, fp128 %imag) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fast_cabsl(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = fmul fast fp128 [[REAL:%.*]], [[REAL]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = fmul fast fp128 [[IMAG:%.*]], [[IMAG]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP3:%.*]] = fadd fast fp128 [[TMP1]], [[TMP2]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CABS:%.*]] = tail call fast fp128 @llvm.sqrt.f128(fp128 [[TMP3]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret fp128 [[CABS]]
  %call = tail call fast fp128 @cabsl(fp128 %real, fp128 %imag)
  ret fp128 %call
}

declare fp128 @cabsl(fp128, fp128)
alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define fp128 @fast_cabsl(fp128 %real, fp128 %imag) {
  %1 = fmul fast fp128 %real, %real
  %2 = fmul fast fp128 %imag, %imag
  %3 = fadd fast fp128 %1, %2
  %cabs = tail call fast fp128 @llvm.sqrt.f128(fp128 %3)
  ret fp128 %cabs
}

declare fp128 @cabsl(fp128, fp128)

; Function Attrs: nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare fp128 @llvm.sqrt.f128(fp128) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
declare fp128 @cabsl(fp128, fp128)

define fp128 @fast_cabsl(fp128 %real, fp128 %imag) {
#0:
  %call = tail call fp128 @cabsl(fp128 %real, fp128 %imag) NNaN
  ret fp128 %call
}
=>
define fp128 @fast_cabsl(fp128 %real, fp128 %imag) {
#0:
  %#1 = fmul fast fp128 %real, %real
  %#2 = fmul fast fp128 %imag, %imag
  %#3 = fadd fast fp128 %#1, %#2
  %cabs = sqrt fast fp128 %#3
  ret fp128 %cabs
}
ERROR: Timeout

Summary:
  0 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  1 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

  %call = tail call fast fp128 @cabsl(fp128 %real, fp128 0xL00000000000000008000000000000000)
  ret fp128 %call
}
